Applicable SOPs: PO has a Wrong Price SOP (DSC2S) - VCN
Text: Hello [supplier team], I appreciate your willingness to ship the item if we are able to update the price on this order. Due to system limitations we are unable to make any changes to a PO after the PO has been created. Because we are unable to update the price, we are canceling this PO. Some additional checks that can be completed on your end: 1. Go to Partner Home > Products > Pricing Home > Products Tab and click on the "Export Catalog" to download your current price list. If the prices on POs are the same as in the spreadsheet, the prices are valid. Please ship orders as they are. For any follow-up questions, please contact your account manager or review the Help Center article on pricing updates: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/1305 . 2. Have you added pricing updates recently? If yes, go to Partner Home > Products > Pricing Hub > Pricing Request Management and look at the status and start dates of all pricing batches. If the recently submitted pricing batch is in status ‘completed’ or ‘scheduled’ and the part number from the PO is in this batch: please check the start date of the batch and the date the order was placed in the PO. If the order was placed before the start date, then the PO will have the old price. Please keep in mind that Wayfair requires a 30-day advance notice period for all price increases. Please ship the order with the price stated in the PO as we consider this to be correct. If you have questions around promotional pricing, please contact the Supplier Service Desk at supplierservicedesk@wayfair.com . We want to make sure all your concerns are heard, so if this issue persists, please feel free to reach back out in this thread, and I will be happy to further assist. Otherwise, if I've resolved your concerns for the time being, I hope you have a great day! Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Thank you,

Applicable SOPs: PO has a Wrong Price SOP (DSC2S) - VCN
Text: Dear Valued Partner, Thank you for reaching out regarding the pricing error. Please note that, in future, the best way to flag incorrect pricing is to delay the order under "Incorrect Pricing," where you will be prompted to provide the correct price. To ensure a smooth experience for our mutual customers, please review the following instructions for your upcoming order. Ship by the Must-Ship-By Date: To uphold customer satisfaction, please ship the order by the specified must-ship-by date listed on the PO, adhering to the pricing on the original Purchase Order (PO). PO Price Disagreement: Refer to Pricing Home [Link: https://partners.wayfair.com/d/pricing-home/products ] to confirm your current product base cost and whether there was a promotional discount during the time of purchase. For additional guidance on how to investigate PO pricing discrepancies please refer to our "Price Discrepancy: Quick Investigation Steps" [Link: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/2500 ] Communication: Please let us know within 48 hours if you have any further difficulties fulfilling this order. If you do not respond within 48 hours, we will cancel the order. Each cancellation impacts our mutual customer experience. We encourage our partners to be vigilant when choosing to cancel. Please be aware that having a high cancellation rate could result in Wayfair taking customer-protection measures such as SKU removal from the site or account suspension. Thank you for helping us provide an exceptional experience for our customers together. Best regards, Your order support team
